characters.description: A Caravaner's Guild dimensional mage who is expanding a responsive storage artifact, empowering cargo spaces, and harvesting dangerous ending berries. She has just connected an artifact knife to herself with a blood-made Archon Star.
characters.name: Tala

characters.description: A mysterious bird that shadows Tala near the ending-tree grove. It accepts jerky, can reduce its size, and crosses space with startling speed, but its motives and the limits of its abilities are unclear.
characters.name: Mysterious dimensional bird

characters.description: A responsive dimensional storage space that grows more useful when Tala supplies raw power. Its interior adds light, shelving, and access features in apparent response to her needs, though she does not know whether it possesses awareness.
characters.name: Tala's dimensional storage item

characters.description: A returning caravan defensive mage and trusted adviser to Tala. He supplied the map that leads her to the ending-tree grove.
characters.name: Trent

characters.description: An Order of the Harvest contact and artifact merchant who hosts Tala at her home. Her spouse and son are gate-less and work with artifacts, making the household a promising source of specialized knowledge and practical research.
characters.name: Artia

characters.description: Artia's gate-less spouse, an Order of the Harvest member and artifact researcher. They explain how artifacts use power and respond to ownership, then agree to exchange a copy of their research for ending berries.
characters.name: Artia's spouse

characters.description: An Order of the Harvest member and caravan cook whose earlier history with Tala has left him remorseful. During a meal with Artia's household, he and Tala directly agree to regard each other as friends.
characters.name: Brand

characters.description: A powerful remote mentor who advances Tala's education by sending introductory mageling, inscription, and material-reference books. His instruction gives her a foundation for understanding her unusual magic and artifacts.
characters.name: Grediv

characters.description: The name Tala gives her dimensional storage item after it repeatedly enlarges and arranges its interior for her. It remains responsive but poorly understood, needs power, and cannot yet provide a fully secure refuge.
characters.name: Kit

characters.description: The name accepted by the dimensional bird that has been following Tala. He protects her from a threatening group, can change size and scout nearby people, and responds reliably to jerky, although Tala cannot command him.
characters.name: Terry

characters.description: Trent's mageling and a returning caravan mage. Renix is ready to purchase independent inscriptions and graduate, but freely remains Trent's student while preparing to share magical responsibility on the return journey.
characters.name: Renix

characters.description: A returning caravan mage whose assignment changes before the departure from Alefast. She will not accompany Tala, Trent, and Renix on the return caravan, requiring the group to proceed without her established magical support.
characters.name: Atrexia

characters.description: A caravan military authority who interrupts Tala while she empowers the Guild's cargo slots and challenges her right to perform the work. His intervention disrupts her concentration, and the dispute remains unsettled when he first appears.
characters.name: Master sergeant

characters.description: An exceptionally large immaterial creator who joins the caravan after training under Grediv. He specializes in creating kinetic energy and appears powerful but socially inexperienced.
characters.name: Young kinetic mage

characters.description: A caravan driver who cautions Tala against reckless violence because others now depend on her. The warning emphasizes her responsibility to the people relying on her work.
characters.name: Caravan driver

characters.description: A guard and hand-to-hand instructor who begins the next stage of Tala's physical training. He assigns sustained core work and plans morning sparring against partners able to test her unusual defenses.
characters.name: Adam

characters.description: An experienced material creator assigned to caravan protection. He notices that partly eaten magical creatures may be bait left by a larger hunter and approaches potential danger with close attention to rules.
characters.name: Senior air-focused caravan mage

characters.description: A guard and former student of Adam who offers to spar with Tala.
characters.name: Ashin

characters.description: An overwhelming magic user who confronts Tala in the mountains. She recognizes the Archon Stars within Tala and offers to erase Tala's obligations and pay her heavily in return for permanent, subordinate soul-bonded service.
characters.name: Unnamed powerful mountain woman

characters.description: Tala's practical Guild contact in Bandfast. She received notice that Tala was missing, organized emergency arrangements for the affected cargo, and now explains the financial and administrative consequences of the disappearance.
characters.name: Lyn

characters.description: An inscriber in Bandfast who takes Tala directly to her workshop after the caravan returns. She is ready to begin the next stage of the defensive inscription work Tala has been awaiting and approaches the treatment as specialized professional work.
characters.name: Holly
